name: mahmoud-akram-portfolio
description: Premium purple neon personal portfolio monorepo for Mahmoud Akram.

scripts.build: npm --workspaces=false --prefix packages/types run build && npm --workspaces=false --prefix apps/api run build && npm --workspaces=false --prefix apps/web run build
scripts.lint: npm --workspaces=false --prefix apps/web run lint && npm --workspaces=false --prefix apps/api run lint
